messages: Super Puppy reminds you to stop for a snack break!
Super Puppy would like to touch your butt!
Super Puppy thinks your snoot is really cute!
Super Puppy wants to know what you want for dinner?
Super Puppy wants to start a howl!
Super Puppy is asking for permission to hug?
Super Puppy says only you can prevent forest fires! With your butt!
Super Puppy thinks pandas are the best animals! After puppies, of course!
Super Puppy thinks he just saw a mouse!
Super Puppy would never eat a puffin!
